response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience with deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency directly matching the core stack, explicit AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at the current role satisfying the increasingly important AI requirement, and demonstrated production experience with AWS, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes. The main gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and Kotlin (only incidental Java usage), but the breadth and depth of the stack otherwise make this a strong fit for a mid-senior individual contributor role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience across multiple companies including current role at re:cinq
Explicit AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work directly aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Strong cloud and infrastructure coverage: AWS CDK (Optilyz), Docker (multiple roles), Kubernetes (GISCollective) plus MongoDB and MySQL
concerns: Nest.js never mentioned — while Node.js expertise is clear, Nest.js-specific patterns and DI conventions may require a ramp-up
Kotlin/Java exposure appears minimal and incidental (robotic arms project), not production backend services as the role expects
Vitest and Playwright not explicitly listed; testing background is strong (TDD culture, own D-lang testing libraries) but familiarity with the specific frameworks is unconfirmed

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
